subject: M crashes when creating species
body:
Hi everyone,

I've been trying to create a species in M but it keeps crashing after the 
"training denoising" step. The following error message appears (see below) 
in which it can't seem to find a particular file. I've checked the folder 
and the file is there which puzzles me. I was wondering if anyone has 
encountered this before? Any advice will be greatly appreciated -- thanks 
in advance!

8/11/2021 11:51:24 AM:
System.IO.FileNotFoundException: Could not find file 
'Y:\claris_warp\20210817\m\20211108\species\31b99238\cls04_noisenet\variables\variables_temp_e2f451cd6a9445b59814bfc20fa41dea\part-00000-of-00001.data-00000-of-00001'.
File name: 
'Y:\claris_warp\20210817\m\20211108\species\31b99238\cls04_noisenet\variables\variables_temp_e2f451cd6a9445b59814bfc20fa41dea\part-00000-of-00001.data-00000-of-00001'
   at System.IO.__Error.WinIOError(Int32 errorCode, String maybeFullPath)
   at System.IO.File.InternalMove(String sourceFileName, String 
destFileName, Boolean checkHost)
   at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Export(String newModelDir) in 
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 274
   at Warp.Sociology.Species.CalculateResolutionAndFilter(Single 
fixedResolution, Action`1 progressCallback) in 
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Sociology\Species.cs:line 1635
   at 
M.MainWindow.<>c__DisplayClass28_2.<ButtonPopulationAddSpecies_OnClick>b__4() 
in D:\Dev\warp2\M\MainWindow.xaml.cs:line 484
   at System.Threading.Tasks.Task.Execute()
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at 
System.Runtime.CompilerServices.TaskAwaiter.HandleNonSuccessAndDebuggerNotification(Task 
task)
   at 
M.MainWindow.<>c__DisplayClass28_1.<<ButtonPopulationAddSpecies_OnClick>b__3>d.MoveNext() 
in D:\Dev\warp2\M\MainWindow.xaml.cs:line 493
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.InternalRealCall(Delegate 
callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs)
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.TryCatchWhen(Object source, 
Delegate callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs, Delegate catchHandler)
   at System.IO.__Error.WinIOError(Int32 errorCode, String maybeFullPath)
   at System.IO.File.InternalMove(String sourceFileName, String 
destFileName, Boolean checkHost)
   at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Export(String newModelDir) in 
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 274
   at Warp.Sociology.Species.CalculateResolutionAndFilter(Single 
fixedResolution, Action`1 progressCallback) in 
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Sociology\Species.cs:line 1635
   at 
M.MainWindow.<>c__DisplayClass28_2.<ButtonPopulationAddSpecies_OnClick>b__4() 
in D:\Dev\warp2\M\MainWindow.xaml.cs:line 484
   at System.Threading.Tasks.Task.Execute()
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at 
System.Runtime.CompilerServices.TaskAwaiter.HandleNonSuccessAndDebuggerNotification(Task 
task)
   at 
M.MainWindow.<>c__DisplayClass28_1.<<ButtonPopulationAddSpecies_OnClick>b__3>d.MoveNext() 
in D:\Dev\warp2\M\MainWindow.xaml.cs:line 493
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---

Best,
Claris
